products.title: Kitchen Solid-wood Wall-mounted Magnetic Knife Holder No Drilling Required
products.body_html:

Slow Feeding and Improved Digestion - Dog puzzle toys for medium-sized dogs and small dogs are a great way to improve digestion and prevent overeating. They promote healthy digestion by decreasing the speed of eating and encouraging more playtime. The screw design of the toys increases difficulty and promotes more fun during mealtime.

EASY TO USE AND CLEAN - Our dog puzzles are designed for easy use. Simply place kibble in the toy and your dog will chase it to get to the food. The toy rolls when pushed by your dog.

products.title: Turmeric Exfoliating Cleansing Pads Compressed Facial Sponges Skin Care Tools For Face Clogged Pores Excess Oil Cleansing
products.body_html:
Overview:

1. Enhanced Refreshment: Enjoy luxury while cleansing with our Turmeric Cleansing Pads. The outside has many small holes for optimal water absorption and rich, delicate foam, while the ultra-soft texture allows for a comfortable cleanse.
2. Gentle Deep Clean: Enjoy a nourishing cleanse with our Turmeric Cleansing Pads, which effectively remove excess oil, dirt, and impurities, leaving your skin clean and smooth. Infused with turmeric, this safe facial cleaning tool deeply cleanses pores.
3. Easy Portability: Crafted with top-notch materials, these petite, lightweight Turmeric Cleansing Pads are a breeze to transport, promoting a more light-up, even skin tone while ensuring effortless facial cleanliness.
4. Easy to Use: Enhance your daily cleanse by using Turmeric Cleansing Pads with foaming cleanser & gentle circular motions. Soak, wring, and reuse for a deep cleansing effect that lasts for weeks. Pair it with your favorite cleansing cream.
5. Considerate Gift: Infused with turmeric, these gentle yet effective pads remove impurities and revitalize the skin. Suitable for birthdays, holidays, and any special occasion.

Description:

With small holes that ensure good water absorption and soft texture, it will effectively cleanse your face, removing excess oil and deeply cleansing pores. The small size and lightweight make it easy to carry and perfect for trips. Soak it in water until it expands and wring out any excess water before using.

products.title: 2 PCS Skin Rash Repair Kit
products.body_html:
Adopted high-tech; electronic ion carbonation function which can achieve instant sweep freckles; senile plaques; flat moles; etc.. Additionally; it can be achieved without bleeding in the case of fast; safe and no side effect of medical beauty. Furthermore; with 9 levels of intensity; you can adjust our device to treat various skin conditions. The lower level is recommended for age spots and freckles. The stronger level is suggested for use on skin tags. Several treatments may be needed depending on your skin condition. Amazing results can be achieved without bleeding and with rapid healing of the skin.

Feature：

  • *【Safe & Effective】 - iMounTEK skin tag repair kit adopted with high-tech; electronic ion carbonation function which can achieve instant sweep freckles; senile plaques; flat moles; etc. Additionally; it can be achieved without bleeding in the case of fast; safe and no side effects of medical beauty.

 

  • *【9 Adjustable Levels】- with 9 levels of intensity; you can adjust our device to treat various skin conditions. The lower level is recommended for age spots and freckles. The stronger level is suggested for use on skin tags. Several treatments may be needed depending on your skin condition. Amazing results can be achieved without bleeding and with rapid healing of the skin.

 

  • *【Protection Function】- Press and hold the ON button for 2 minutes to stop output. If needed to continue to work; release the ON button the press it again.

 

  • *【Supremely Portable】- Super-compact(1.6*1.2*7.3in) and weighting only 0.21lbs to easily slip into a bag.

 

  • *【Easy Operation】- Skin tag remover is easy to operate. Can be used anytime anywhere. Please read the product description and instruction carefully.

2. Electrical muscle stimulation, the latest scientific and healthy fitness technology, send a signal to muscles directly to promote muscle movement, to help you achieve a more beautiful physique.

3. Just paste the backside Muscle Toner. You can tighten your muscles while watching TV, learning, etc.

products.title: Black Double Door Smoked Vertical Iron Carbon Oven With Upper And Lower Doors
products.body_html:
Introductions:
Take your outdoor cooking to the next level with this versatile Outdoor Smoker. Featuring a dual-door design and two detachable grill nettings, this smoker offers ample cooking capacity for everything from fish and veggies to a whole chicken. Built with convenience in mind, the built-in thermometer and adjustable air vents allow precise temperature control for perfect results every time. Its durable iron structure is finished with high-temperature-resistant paint, ensuring long-lasting performance. Whether you're grilling, smoking, or roasting, this charcoal smoker is your perfect companion for backyard barbecues, camping trips, or family gatherings.

Features:
1. Precise Temperature Control: Equipped with an easy-to-read thermometer on the upper door and four adjustable air vents on the sides, this smoker allows you to effortlessly regulate heat and airflow for consistent smoking and grilling results.
2. Spacious Cooking Area: Includes two detachable grill nettings that provide ample space for a variety of foods, from veggies and meats to an entire chicken. Perfect for entertaining family and friends outdoors.
3. Double Door Convenience: The two-door design minimizes heat and smoke loss when adding charcoal or checking your food, preserving the rich smoky flavors while ensuring safe and easy operation.
4. Durable & Heat-Resistant Construction: Crafted from high-temperature-resistant painted carbon steel, this smoker features chromium-plated grills for excellent heat conductivity and spring-style handles to protect your hands from burns.
5. Multi-Purpose Functionality: This smoker is designed for both smoking and charcoal grilling. Add wood chips to the charcoal pan for a delicious smoky flavor or use it as a traditional charcoal grill for quick and easy meals.

Specifications:

Enjoy the perfect blend of comfort, durability, and portability with this Set of 2 Webbed Folding Beach Chairs. Designed for outdoor enthusiasts, these foldable chairs are ideal for beach trips, camping, fishing, poolside lounging, or any outdoor adventure. Featuring powder-coated steel frames and breathable, fade-resistant webbing, they offer long-lasting durability. The compact foldable design makes them easy to store and transport, while the vibrant colors add a pop of fun to your outdoor setup. Whether you're relaxing in the yard, at a BBQ, or on a camping trip, these chairs provide excellent support and comfort.

Features:

5. Bright & Versatile Design: With vibrant colors and a comfortable, spacious seat, these chairs are ideal for a wide range of outdoor activities, from beach days to backyard BBQs and camping trips.

products.title: Black Double Door Smoked Vertical Iron Carbon Oven With Upper And Lower Doors
products.body_html:
Introductions:
Take your outdoor cooking to the next level with this versatile Outdoor Smoker. Featuring a dual-door design and two detachable grill nettings, this smoker offers ample cooking capacity for everything from fish and veggies to a whole chicken. Built with convenience in mind, the built-in thermometer and adjustable air vents allow precise temperature control for perfect results every time. Its durable iron structure is finished with high-temperature-resistant paint, ensuring long-lasting performance. Whether you're grilling, smoking, or roasting, this charcoal smoker is your perfect companion for backyard barbecues, camping trips, or family gatherings.

Features:
1. Precise Temperature Control: Equipped with an easy-to-read thermometer on the upper door and four adjustable air vents on the sides, this smoker allows you to effortlessly regulate heat and airflow for consistent smoking and grilling results.
2. Spacious Cooking Area: Includes two detachable grill nettings that provide ample space for a variety of foods, from veggies and meats to an entire chicken. Perfect for entertaining family and friends outdoors.
3. Double Door Convenience: The two-door design minimizes heat and smoke loss when adding charcoal or checking your food, preserving the rich smoky flavors while ensuring safe and easy operation.
4. Durable & Heat-Resistant Construction: Crafted from high-temperature-resistant painted carbon steel, this smoker features chromium-plated grills for excellent heat conductivity and spring-style handles to protect your hands from burns.
5. Multi-Purpose Functionality: This smoker is designed for both smoking and charcoal grilling. Add wood chips to the charcoal pan for a delicious smoky flavor or use it as a traditional charcoal grill for quick and easy meals.

Specifications:
1. Overall Dimensions: (15.9 x 15.4 x 40) in / (40.5 x 39 x 101.5) cm
2. Leg Height: 9.3 in / 23.5 cm
3. Oven Height: 30.9 in / 78.5 cm
4. Upper Door Dimensions: (15 x 15.7) in / (38 x 40) cm
5. Lower Door Dimensions: (9.8 x 15.7) in / (25 x 40) cm
6. Water Pan Dimensions: Outer Diameter: 15 in / 38 cm, Inner Diameter: 13.2 in / 33.5 cm, Height: 3.5 in / 9 cm
7. Grill Netting Dimensions: (14.6 x 15) in / (37 x 38) cm
8. Thermometer Diameter: 2.2 in / 5.5 cm
9. Side Vent Diameter: 3.9 in / 10 cm
10. Handle Length: 4.7 in / 12 cm
11. Side Handle Dimensions: (3.9 x 3.1) in / (10 x 8) cm
12. Material: Iron + Enamel
13. Net Weight: 38.8 lbs / 17.6 kg

Package Includes:

1 x Vertical Charcoal Smoker

Take your outdoor cooking to the next level with this versatile Outdoor Smoker. Featuring a dual-door design and two detachable grill nettings, this smoker offers ample cooking capacity for everything from fish and veggies to a whole chicken. Built with convenience in mind, the built-in thermometer and adjustable air vents allow precise temperature control for perfect results every time. Its durable iron structure is finished with high-temperature-resistant paint, ensuring long-lasting performance. Whether you're grilling, smoking, or roasting, this charcoal smoker is your perfect companion for backyard barbecues, camping trips, or family gatherings.

2. Spacious Cooking Area: Includes two detachable grill nettings that provide ample space for a variety of foods, from veggies and meats to an entire chicken. Perfect for entertaining family and friends outdoors.
3. Double Door Convenience: The two-door design minimizes heat and smoke loss when adding charcoal or checking your food, preserving the rich smoky flavors while ensuring safe and easy operation.
4. Durable & Heat-Resistant Construction: Crafted from high-temperature-resistant painted carbon steel, this smoker features chromium-plated grills for excellent heat conductivity and spring-style handles to protect your hands from burns.
5. Multi-Purpose Functionality: This smoker is designed for both smoking and charcoal grilling. Add wood chips to the charcoal pan for a delicious smoky flavor or use it as a traditional charcoal grill for quick and easy meals.

Introductions:
Take your outdoor cooking to the next level with this versatile Outdoor Smoker. Featuring a dual-door design and two detachable grill nettings, this smoker offers ample cooking capacity for everything from fish and veggies to a whole chicken. Built with convenience in mind, the built-in thermometer and adjustable air vents allow precise temperature control for perfect results every time. Its durable iron structure is finished with high-temperature-resistant paint, ensuring long-lasting performance. Whether you're grilling, smoking, or roasting, this charcoal smoker is your perfect companion for backyard barbecues, camping trips, or family gatherings.

Features:
1. Precise Temperature Control: Equipped with an easy-to-read thermometer on the upper door and four adjustable air vents on the sides, this smoker allows you to effortlessly regulate heat and airflow for consistent smoking and grilling results.
2. Spacious Cooking Area: Includes two detachable grill nettings that provide ample space for a variety of foods, from veggies and meats to an entire chicken. Perfect for entertaining family and friends outdoors.
3. Double Door Convenience: The two-door design minimizes heat and smoke loss when adding charcoal or checking your food, preserving the rich smoky flavors while ensuring safe and easy operation.
4. Durable & Heat-Resistant Construction: Crafted from high-temperature-resistant painted carbon steel, this smoker features chromium-plated grills for excellent heat conductivity and spring-style handles to protect your hands from burns.
5. Multi-Purpose Functionality: This smoker is designed for both smoking and charcoal grilling. Add wood chips to the charcoal pan for a delicious smoky flavor or use it as a traditional charcoal grill for quick and easy meals.

Take your outdoor cooking to the next level with this versatile Outdoor Smoker. Featuring a dual-door design and two detachable grill nettings, this smoker offers ample cooking capacity for everything from fish and veggies to a whole chicken. Built with convenience in mind, the built-in thermometer and adjustable air vents allow precise temperature control for perfect results every time. Its durable iron structure is finished with high-temperature-resistant paint, ensuring long-lasting performance. Whether you're grilling, smoking, or roasting, this charcoal smoker is your perfect companion for backyard barbecues, camping trips, or family gatherings.

Features:

3. Double Door Convenience: The two-door design minimizes heat and smoke loss when adding charcoal or checking your food, preserving the rich smoky flavors while ensuring safe and easy operation.
4. Durable & Heat-Resistant Construction: Crafted from high-temperature-resistant painted carbon steel, this smoker features chromium-plated grills for excellent heat conductivity and spring-style handles to protect your hands from burns.
5. Multi-Purpose Functionality: This smoker is designed for both smoking and charcoal grilling. Add wood chips to the charcoal pan for a delicious smoky flavor or use it as a traditional charcoal grill for quick and easy meals.

products.title: 2pcs, Folding Beach Chairs
products.body_html:
Introductions:
Enjoy the perfect blend of comfort, durability, and portability with this Set of 2 Webbed Folding Beach Chairs. Designed for outdoor enthusiasts, these foldable chairs are ideal for beach trips, camping, fishing, poolside lounging, or any outdoor adventure. Featuring powder-coated steel frames and breathable, fade-resistant webbing, they offer long-lasting durability. The compact foldable design makes them easy to store and transport, while the vibrant colors add a pop of fun to your outdoor setup. Whether you're relaxing in the yard, at a BBQ, or on a camping trip, these chairs provide excellent support and comfort.

Features:
1. Durable Construction: Built to last, these beach chairs feature a robust powder-coated steel frame and durable, fade-resistant webbing that stands up to the elements for long-lasting outdoor use.
2. Sturdy & Stable Design: The A-frame steel structure and reinforced foot sleeves provide excellent stability, ensuring these chairs can comfortably support up to 260 lbs without compromising safety.
3. Lightweight & Easy to Carry: Weighing only 7.7 lbs, these foldable chairs are incredibly portable. With a compact folding size of 34.3 x 21.7 x 2.8 in, they are easy to store and carry on your outdoor adventures.
4. No Assembly Required: These chairs come fully assembled, so you can enjoy instant relaxation. Simply unfold and get comfy—no tools required!
5. Bright & Versatile Design: With vibrant colors and a comfortable, spacious seat, these chairs are ideal for a wide range of outdoor activities, from beach days to backyard BBQs and camping trips.

products.title: Folding Binoculars Factory, High-power, High-definition, Low-light Night Vision, Outdoor Pocket-sized Mini 40X22&
products.body_html:
Purchasing and Usage Notes

  • Clarify the usage scenario: Astronomical observation requires large-aperture, high-magnification astronomical telescopes; for daily outdoor use, prioritize lightweight binoculars (such as 8×42 or 10×50 specifications) that balance magnification and field of view.
  • Balance magnification and aperture: Within the allowable range of portability, choose models with larger apertures to ensure imaging quality; magnification should be selected according to needs, generally 8-12 times for daily use, and can be increased as needed for astronomical observation.
  • Pay attention to optical performance: High-quality telescopes usually have lenses coated with anti-reflective coatings (reducing light reflection and increasing light transmittance), making images clearer and brighter; some high-end products also use special lenses to eliminate chromatic aberration.
  • Usage and maintenance: Avoid looking directly at the Sun to prevent eye damage; store in a dry, dust-proof case when not in use to prevent lens moisture and mildew; clean lenses with a dedicated lens cloth or lens paper to avoid scratches.

products.title: Paper Shredder, 14-Sheet Cross-Cut, 6.6 Gallon Wastebasket, P-4 Security Level, 3 Modes Design - Jam-Proof Heavy-Duty Shredder For Home And Office, FBA Shipping
products.body_html:
1.Professional-grade Performance: With a maximum capacity of 14 sheets at a time, this shredder effortlessly handles A4-sized documents, credit cards, and even paper clips, ensuring that your confidential documents are securely destroyed.making it the ideal choice for small businesses, home offices, and professional settings.

2.Jam-proof Technology: Say goodbye to frustrating paper jams with our innovative jam-proof design. Equipped with US Patented stainless cutter, this shredder is 100% protected against damages caused by paper jams. 

3.Secure and Efficient: Our cross-cut paper shredder ensures a P-4 high-security level, shredding documents down into tiny 5/32" x 1-13/32" (4x35mm) particles.

4.Convenient and User-friendly: Our shredder features a 3-mode control switch (Auto, Off, Reverse), allowing for easy operation and quick clearing of any paper jams. The auto start/stop function further simplifies the shredding process, while the manual reverse function helps resolve any potential issues. 

5.Reliable Customer Service: We stand behind the quality of our product and provide reliable customer service.  you can purchase with confidence.
